name: National Geographic Presents: IMPACT with Gal Gadot
original_name: National Geographic Presents: IMPACT with Gal Gadot
overview: Follow inspiring women living in communities marred by violence, poverty, trauma, discrimination, oppression and natural disasters, and yet, against all odds, dare to dream, stand out, speak up and lead.
